Unknown command! Type "help" to see available commands.
help
The available commands will be listed below:
Commands available for "fika" prefix:

Subcommand adminsettings:
fika adminsettings

Opens the settings GUI if you are a registered admin.

Subcommand fleaban:
fika fleaban
Bans a player from the flea for X days
Example: fika fleaban Nickname 7
Use 0 to ban indefinitely.

Subcommand forcelogout:
fika forcelogout
Forces a client to logout if they are in the menu
Example: fika forcelogout Nickname
Use all to logout everyone (including you).

Subcommand listprofiles:
fika listprofiles
Lists all profileIds and nicknames.
Nicknames are used for most commands

Subcommand removefleaban:
fika removefleaban
Unbans a player from the flea
Example: fika removefleaban Nickname

Subcommand sendmessage:
fika sendmessage
Sends a message to a client
Example: fika sendmessage Nickname hello
Use all as a nickname to send to everyone (including you).

Subcommand shutdownclient:
fika shutdownclient
Forces a headless client to shutdown
Example: fika shutdownclient Nickname

Subcommand spoofmessage:
fika spoofmessage
Spoofs a message to a client, using a fake account
Example: fika spoofmessage Nickname "Test" hello
Note: Fake account name has to be surrounded by quotes
